title: firecrawl/firecrawl
friendlyTitle: A web scraping and search tool built for AI agents
summary: Firecrawl is an open-source API for searching, scraping, crawling, and interacting with web pages at scale, returning clean Markdown, structured data, screenshots, and other agent-ready formats. The project is widely used as web-context infrastructure for LLM apps and AI agents.
friendlySummary: Firecrawl helps AI apps search the web and turn web pages into clean text or structured data.
whyItMatters: AI builders can use Firecrawl to give agents cleaner web input without hand-writing scraping infrastructure. It is particularly useful for RAG, research assistants, data extraction, monitoring, and workflows that need reliable conversion from messy web pages to model-ready text.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It helps developers feed better web information into AI tools without building a scraper from scratch.
